title: Unlock Your Job Types
subtitle: Choose which jobs you want to receive. The more specific, the better your matches.
trustLine: Better matching = more quality leads you actually want

progress.hint: Unlock at least {{min}} to start receiving matched leads

browse.emptyHint: Unlock your first job type to get started

preferences.title: Set Your Priorities
preferences.subtitle: Tell us which jobs you love vs prefer to avoid

wizard.jumpToStep: Jump to any step and update your details.

basicInfo.title: Tell us about yourself
basicInfo.description: This is what clients will see when they view your profile.
basicInfo.phoneHint: We'll send you WhatsApp notifications about new jobs
basicInfo.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. Reliable electrician with 15+ years experience
basicInfo.taglineHint: A short headline that appears with your name
basicInfo.bioPlaceholder: Tell clients about your experience, qualifications, and what makes you great at what you do...
basicInfo.somethingWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

serviceArea.title: Where do you work?
serviceArea.description: Tap the areas of Ibiza where you're happy to take jobs.
serviceArea.islandWide: Great! You'll receive jobs from across Ibiza
serviceArea.selectAtLeast: Please select at least one area

serviceUnlock.title: Which jobs do you want?
serviceUnlock.description: Tap any job you're happy to do. We'll only send you these.
serviceUnlock.noNeedAll: You don't need to select everything.
serviceUnlock.addMoreLater: You can always add more jobs later from your dashboard.
serviceUnlock.selectMinimum: Select at least 1 job to continue

review.readyDescription: Check everything looks good, then hit the button.
review.almostDescription: Complete the items below to go live.
review.sendJobsFor: We'll only send you jobs for:
review.changeAnytime: You can change this anytime from your dashboard.
review.completeAll: Complete all checklist items to go live
review.liveSuccess: 🎉 You're live! Time to start receiving work.
review.goLiveFailed: Failed to go live. Please try again.
